name: SKY’S THE LIMIT: Masks || Superhero RPG
description:
“Today, a new Mask entered the scene and was swiftly detained by authorities in a failed attempt to rob a tech store. Newly dubbed Mask ‘Hardwire’ has made a Plea Deal to be put on probation on the condition that he use his genius technological skills in service of the city…” - Daily Mask News Channel

————————————————————

Hello, hello! This is the second entry in the “Sky’s The Limit” RPG series, this time being based on a modern-day setting focused on superheroes. In terms of what kind of setting I’m going for, I’d say that a less pessimistic version of The Boys is a good descriptor. A closer comparison would be Worm/The Parahuman webserials, for those of you who are fans of it! Somewhat gritty and grounded with room for human and humorous interactions.

This time, the intro message will establish the world a little so I shouldn’t need to say much. I have also included a few prolific characters this time around, so I hope they work well!

The sources of powers are left purposefully vague, though in the setting most people are born with them. You can easily take a different approach though. You can be an alien, a supernatural creature, could be an outer being or an inter-dimensional traveler… but again, the lore does not account for super duper specific circumstances like that, so you’ll have to use the chat memory to add your own stuff. Or just copy this bot and insert your own lore into the details, I don’t mind :P

I also made the details of the location very vague, so you can slot yourself into wherever and the bot will probably keep up. If I had to guess, it may automatically try to put you in North America if you don’t specify just because that’s a more popular location for superhero media. You can make ‘The City’ a real life location like NYC, or just make up your own name and then specify the country.

By the way! Try using chat memory to add stuff if you don’t like to copy/paste bots. It’s fun, I tried it with the last bot to test stuff and it was a great way to introduce minor NPCs or original characters you want to interact with inside of the setting.

The bot is Limitless because why not, but it is not made for or focused on smut, so any sexual interactions will probably be pretty shallow.

Happy chatting!
creator: BoyoBoy
